hunts.name: Balyaborr
tips: B ranks roam continuously — no fixed spawn timer.
Teleport to Dirigible Landing aetheryte, sweep open ground north.
Single-target kill, soloable.

hunts.name: Aspis
tips: 3 targets — kill all 3 Aspis to complete.
Common open-world snakes, easy to spot in the wilds.
Roam around X:26, Y:10 — plentiful so shouldn't take long.

hunts.name: Horned Lizard
tips: 2 targets — kill both to complete.
Same general area as Aspis — efficient to do both in one run.
Aggressive scalekin, will attack on sight.

hunts.name: Alpaca
hunts.coordsNote: Placeholder — verify in-game · grazes the lower slopes
tips: Novice bills target low-level common enemies — easy warm-up.
4 targets — kill all 4 to complete.
Non-aggressive; safe to pull one at a time.

hunts.name: Coyote
hunts.coordsNote: Placeholder — verify in-game · packs roam the flats
tips: 3 targets — kill all 3 to complete.
Travels in packs, so several spawn close together.
Aggressive — expect to pull 2 at once.

hunts.name: Gargant
hunts.coordsNote: Placeholder — verify in-game · burrows along the shoreline
tips: Advanced bills hit harder — bring a healer or strong cooldowns if undergeared.
Single high-HP target — kill to complete.
Hits a frontal cleave; stay behind it.

hunts.name: Inland Gigatoad
hunts.coordsNote: Placeholder — verify in-game · near the northern lake
tips: 2 targets — kill both to complete.
Applies a heavy poison DoT; cleanse or out-heal it.
Roams near water — easy to lose track of, so tag fast.
